---
title: "Conference Text Search"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: "https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/docs/header.html"
      after_body: "https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/docs/footer.html"
---

<style>
h1.title {
  display: none;
}
</style>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="search-common.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>

<div class="gb-search-shell" id="conferenceTextSearchApp">
  <nav class="gb-search-nav" aria-label="Search tools">
    <a class="gb-search-nav__link" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/search/">Reference Search</a>
    <a class="gb-search-nav__link gb-search-nav__link--active" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/search/words">Conference Text Search</a>
    <a class="gb-search-nav__link" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/blog/using-conference-text-search.html">Search Guide</a>
  </nav>

  <section class="gb-search-hero">
    <h1 class="gb-search-hero__title">Conference Text Search</h1>
    <p class="gb-search-hero__subtitle">Track words and phrases across General Conference, compare multiple ideas at once, and click any point or table cell to open the talks behind it.</p>
    <div class="gb-search-help">
      <p class="gb-search-help__title">Search syntax examples</p>
      <ul class="gb-search-help__list">
        <li><strong>faith</strong> = one word</li>
        <li><strong>"plan of salvation"</strong> = exact phrase</li>
        <li><strong>temple || temples</strong> = OR search inside one series</li>
        <li><strong>(faith) ("plan of salvation")</strong> = compare two series</li>
        <li><strong>temple -garment</strong> = include temple, exclude garment</li>
        <li><strong>redeem*</strong> = wildcard prefix search</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="gb-search-card">
    <div class="gb-search-card__heading">
      <div>
        <h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Search conference text</h2>
        <p class="gb-search-card__subtitle">Scatter is the default view. Table mode is still here, and now there are clearer settings, exports, URL sharing, and better feedback while results load.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--2">
      <div class="gb-field" style="grid-column: 1 / -1;">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="wordInput">Word, phrase, or search expression</label>
        <input id="wordInput" class="gb-input" type="text" placeholder='Examples: faith | "plan of salvation" | (Joseph Smith) (Brigham Young)'>
        <p class="gb-field__hint">Use quotes for exact phrases. Use parentheses to compare multiple series. Use <strong>||</strong> inside one series to combine related terms.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-btn-row">
      <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--primary" id="wordSearchButton">Search</button>
      <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary" id="wordClearButton">Clear query</button>
    </div>

    <div id="wordStatus" class="gb-status" aria-live="polite"></div>
  </section>

  <section class="gb-search-card">
    <div class="gb-search-card__heading">
      <div>
        <h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Search options</h2>
        <p class="gb-search-card__subtitle">These settings control how the chart is grouped, how counts are measured, and which talks are included before the chart or table is built.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--4">
      <div class="gb-field">
        <span class="gb-field__label">Group results</span>
        <label class="gb-checkbox" for="wordsByConference">
          <input id="wordsByConference" type="checkbox">
          <span>By conference <span data-toggle="tooltip" title="Off groups the chart by year. On keeps April and October separate.">?</span></span>
        </label>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <span class="gb-field__label">Measurement</span>
        <div class="gb-radio-group">
          <label class="gb-radio" for="wordsMetricPer1000">
            <input id="wordsMetricPer1000" type="radio" name="wordMetricMode" checked>
            <span>Per 1000 words</span>
          </label>
          <label class="gb-radio" for="wordsMetricPerTalk">
            <input id="wordsMetricPerTalk" type="radio" name="wordMetricMode">
            <span>Per talk</span>
          </label>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="wordsChartType">Chart type</label>
        <select id="wordsChartType" class="gb-select">
          <option value="scatter">Scatter</option>
          <option value="line">Line</option>
          <option value="bar">Bar</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <span class="gb-field__label">Display</span>
        <label class="gb-checkbox" for="wordsTableMode">
          <input id="wordsTableMode" type="checkbox">
          <span>Table mode instead of chart</span>
        </label>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <span class="gb-field__label">Case sensitivity</span>
        <label class="gb-checkbox" for="wordsCaseSensitive">
          <input id="wordsCaseSensitive" type="checkbox">
          <span>Match case exactly</span>
        </label>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="wordsYearFrom">Year from</label>
        <input id="wordsYearFrom" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="1970">
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="wordsYearTo">Year to</label>
        <input id="wordsYearTo" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="2025">
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="wordsMonth">Conference month</label>
        <select id="wordsMonth" class="gb-select">
          <option value="">All months</option>
          <option value="April">April</option>
          <option value="October">October</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="wordsSpeaker">Speaker contains</label>
        <input id="wordsSpeaker" class="gb-input" type="text" placeholder="President Nelson">
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-btn-row">
      <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--ghost" id="wordsResetDefaults">Reset settings to defaults</button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="gb-chart-card">
    <div class="gb-toolbar">
      <div>
        <h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Chart and comparison output</h2>
        <p class="gb-search-card__subtitle">Click a point on the chart, or a cell in table mode, to see the talks behind it.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="gb-export-row">
        <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary gb-btn--small" id="wordsExportAggregate" disabled>Export chart data</button>
        <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary gb-btn--small" id="wordsExportTalks" disabled>Export talks table</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-chart-wrap" id="plotContainer">
      <canvas id="plotCanvas" aria-label="Conference text chart"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div id="legendContainer" class="gb-legend" aria-live="polite"></div>
    <div id="aggregateTableContainer"></div>
  </section>

  <div id="talksTableContainer"></div>
</div>

<script src="search-common.js"></script>
<script src="words-search.js"></script>
